examples: The vituperative argument left everyone feeling upset.
His vituperative comments were targeted at his opponent.
The critic's review was vituperative and harsh.

hin.definition: The action or process of giving and receiving
examples: ज्ञान का आदान-प्रदान हमें विकसित करता है.
आदान-प्रदान से हमें बहुत कुछ सीखने को मिलता है.
